title: Evidence Signal Array Schema
description: JSON schema for validating evidence_json arrays stored in claim_evaluations table. Evidence signals document WHY a claim matched a legislative action.

items.description: Evidence signal in format 'type:value' where type identifies the signal category

oneOf.description: URL matched bill page exactly. Format: url_match:{bill_number}
URL partially matched bill reference. Format: url_partial:{matched_substring}
Significant phrase overlap (>3 chars). Format: phrase:{matched_phrase}
Explicit bill reference extracted from claim text. Format: bill_ref:{bill_number}
Timing relationship between claim date and action date. Values include: follow_through, retroactive_credit, unknown (matching engine), plus before/during/after (legacy).
Legislative progress status. Values include: introduced, passed_committee, passed_chamber, enacted, unknown (matching engine), plus passed_house/passed_senate (legacy).
Fuzzy title match using rapidfuzz. Format: fuzzy_title_match:{score}:{threshold}
Bill name extracted from claim text matched action title. Format: claim_text_bill_name:{extracted_name}
Semantic embedding similarity between claim and action. Format: semantic_similarity:{cosine_score}
